notes: Launch-ready Grade 3 card with reading, vocabulary, journals, writing, questions, informational text, and assessments.
Created from local 3rd grade source folder audit.
Source folder includes a 12-chapter text plus vocabulary and comprehension questions.

book.title: Heidi
book.description: Source folder includes a 12-chapter text plus vocabulary and comprehension questions.

weeks.title: Week 25: Heidi Part 1 (Days 121-125)
vocabulary: Family: define and use in a sentence
text clue: find a word or detail that helps you understand the story
journal: What did this week's reading show about Family? Use one story detail.
Which character made an important choice this week? Explain what happened.
writing: Write a character paragraph using one detail from the story.
Add a because sentence that explains your evidence.
questions: Who are the important characters in this section, and what do they want?
What problem or challenge happens in this part of the story?
Which detail helps you understand a character trait, feeling, or lesson?
What central message or lesson is beginning to appear?
informationalText: Mountain life and the Swiss Alps
assessment: Weekly vocabulary check and comprehension response.
Review day: discuss questions, revise writing, and prepare for the next chapters.
